## PR title (squash merge)

Use **Conventional Commits** so the squash commit on `main` stays readable, e.g. `fix(ios): …`, `feat(auth): …`, `chore(ci): …`.

See [DEVELOPING.md](./DEVELOPING.md) (commits, PRs, CI).
